title: Set up next-intl for Next.js internationalization
summary: Complete next-intl setup — install, middleware, messages, provider, useTranslations, server components, locale switching, and common pitfalls.
declaration: I will set up next-intl for internationalization in this Next.js project. This covers the App Router approach (Next.js 13+). If you use Pages Router or prefer a different i18n library (next-i18next, react-intl), say so before I begin.
